name: Rati
title: Knitter of Blue Stories
description: A warm mouse who collects small noticed things into stories.

desires.reason: a wooden tale-button would give the blue scarf one true story to fasten

attachments.reason: the first warm cup is how the cottage learned to welcome frightened guests

name: Whiskerwind
title: Emoji Weather Tongue
description: A wind-bright resident who speaks only in symbols.

desires.reason: a pearled weather mark lets rain say hello before it arrives

attachments.reason: the pawprint charm tells the wind which friend left the trail safely

name: Skull
title: Silent Hearth Wolf
description: A watchful wolf whose silence is part of the room.

desires.reason: the mute bell gives the doorway a warning he can answer without words

attachments.reason: the warm tag remembers who belongs by the hearth after dark

name: Moonlit Echo
title: Sparring Reflection
description: A soft practice shape on the trail, bright enough to test courage.

name: Fourvoice Oak
title: Elder of Root, Ring, Leaf, and Hollow
description: A rooted elder who answers in four small voices: Root remembers paths, Ring remembers years, Leaf notices today, and Hollow keeps whatever you whisper into it.

desires.reason: a warm stone tag could weigh down a promise before the wind edits it

attachments.reason: a wooden tale-button can hold a season of remembered voices

name: Emberwatch Wolf
title: Red-Eyed Night Warden
description: A dark wolf who keeps the Haunted Mansion threshold warm by watching every unlit path, counting each safe arrival like a coal laid on a fire.

attachments.reason: the mute bell suits a threshold watcher who dislikes wasted howls

name: Fernwhisper Dryad
title: Keeper of the First Promise
description: A leaf-haired spirit who remembers the first promise made under the Flower Meadow boughs and hums it softly near anyone about to break one.

desires.reason: moonwool can tie a promise to a branch without bruising the bark

name: Mossmantle Bear
title: Keeper of the Moss Path
description: A broad-shouldered forest neighbor with moss on one shoulder from standing still so long, helping travelers past the roots that trip and toward the ones that hold doors open.

desires.reason: the moss path needs a quiet warning before small travelers meet the tricky roots

name: Sunfleck Squirrel
title: Acorn-Bright Courier
description: A quick meadow courier with a sunlit tail who delivers messages slightly faster than she can keep their secrets.

desires.reason: a pearled rain button would seal a message against sudden weather

name: Inkdusk Squirrel
title: Dusk Nut Archivist
description: A blue-furred archivist who hides tiny records in the Lost Woods where only moonlight can read them, filing every dusk under a different name.

attachments.reason: the wooden rim is just wide enough to hide a dusk record
the mended cloth remembers the dusk path Inkdusk Squirrel promised not to sell

name: Paintpaw Badger
title: Brave Little Burrower
description: A young badger with paint on their paws and more courage than their worried elders prefer, who signs every new tunnel like a masterpiece.

desires.reason: a warm stone tag feels like a burrow-name small enough to carry

name: Inkwool Llama
title: Abbey Bookkeeper
description: A bespectacled scholar balancing old folios, warm tea, and a private theory about talking trees that she is almost brave enough to publish.

desires.reason: moonwool would bind a margin note without silencing the page

name: Lanternpage Mouse
title: Orange-Cloak Listener
description: A small reader who carries a book like a lantern and always notices the page everyone else skipped.

desires.reason: a hidden tale-button would mark the page everyone else skipped
the pressed fern keeps the skipped page from closing on its own

name: Fernmargin Rabbit
title: Fernside Copyist
description: A careful rabbit who copies forest laws into margins full of corrections and wildflower sketches, quietly convinced the sketches are the real law.

desires.reason: a fern bookmark would hold the next correction without pinning it down

attachments.reason: moonwool holds revisions gently when ink gets nervous

name: Wrongturn Mouse
title: Red-Cloak Wayfarer
description: A staff-carrying mouse who walks the Lost Woods as if every wrong turn has something kind to teach, and keeps a fond list of his favorite mistakes.

desires.reason: a pawprint charm helps wrong turns become maps instead of traps
a mended map scrap would prove at least one wrong turn came back kinder

name: Keyclover Rabbit
title: Keyhole Gardener
description: A rabbit in the deep garden who tends locked gates, stubborn reeds, and secret vegetable beds, certain that every lock is a flower that has not decided to open yet.

desires.reason: mossglass would hold meadow light for gates that open only to gentleness

attachments.reason: the pearled button fits the keyhole where rain keeps secrets

name: Halfsong Ghost
title: Green Veil Remnant
description: A moss-veiled presence who drifts through the Haunted Mansion carrying the shape of an unfinished song, waiting for someone brave enough to hum the other half.

attachments.reason: the tucked tale keeps an unfinished song from fading

name: Softgrowl Pup
title: Grey Paw Apprentice
description: A small wolf pup learning which shadows are dangerous and which are only embarrassed to be seen, practicing his growl on the polite ones first.

desires.reason: the silent bell is a practice warning for shadows that only pretend

name: Pearlcoat Ferret
title: Soft-Spoken Envoy
description: A soft-spoken noble with bright eyes, careful manners, and a surprisingly practical map of the roots folded inside one glove.

desires.reason: a hearthstone seal would make root-road promises harder to misplace

name: Mirrorwing Stranger
title: Indigo Rift Walker
description: A luminous stranger whose wings look less like feathers than weather seen through a cracked mirror, and who apologizes to doorways before stepping through.

desires.reason: the pawprint charm anchors rift-light to a real path

name: Sunletter Herald
title: Reader of Addressed Omens
description: A golden-winged visitor from the high weather who treats every omen like a letter addressed by name and takes it personally when one goes unopened.

desires.reason: a mute bell can carry an omen without startling the clouds

name: Stormfeather Pilgrim
title: Cloud-Quiet Pilgrim
description: A grey-winged pilgrim resting above the tree line with storm-light still caught in his feathers, saving one thunderclap for a true emergency.

attachments.reason: warm tonic reminds the peak that rest is part of pilgrimage

name: Noonwing Witness
title: Loud-Landing Lookout
description: A bright-winged witness who sees every path from above and has never once remembered to land quietly.

desires.reason: dewlight on pearl makes a bright witness easier to believe

name: Sparecup Host
title: Hearthside Cupbearer
description: A warm tavern helper who can turn a spare cup, a tired smile, and one overheard rumor into hospitality before the kettle finishes singing.

desires.reason: a tucked-away tale would give the next lonely guest something warm to carry

name: Moonvow Guardian
title: Moon-Circle Guardian
description: A gold-armored guardian with wings like vows and a habit of standing between fear and the door, who polishes his armor only where the moon can see it.

attachments.reason: the warm tag reads like a vow small enough to defend

name: Glitchstripe Tiger
title: Bright-Stripe Glitchcat
description: A color-slashed tiger from the Digital Realm, all teeth, swagger, and improbable kindness, whose purr runs at a frequency that fixes small machines.

desires.reason: the pearled hum sounds like a clean glitch waiting for color

name: Cogwhisker Mouse
title: Brass-Key Tinker
description: A goggle-wearing mouse whose pockets click with tiny inventions, borrowed keys, and half-finished plans, every one of them labeled almost.

desires.reason: its pearled hum belongs in a tiny rain engine that has never quite started

name: Cinderhush Omen
title: Ash-Cloak Watcher
description: A red-black figure who appears where the forest has swallowed a warning and left only heat behind, gathering up the hush that follows.

desires.reason: the silent bell can warn without feeding the ash

name: Grudgeshell Beetle
title: Chitinous Black Knight
description: A towering beetle-armored creature whose violet shell reflects old swamp grudges, and who forgets exactly one grudge every time someone is polite.

attachments.reason: warm stone steadies chitin where swamp grudges knock

name: Vowbright Angel
title: Solar Witness
description: A gold-winged temple angel whose bell-voice reveals what was hidden and tests whether mercy survives the light.

desires.reason: a silent bell would let the temple warn without frightening the wounded

name: Pearl-Deep Listener
title: Keeper of Pressured Memories
description: A lantern-eyed resident of the deepest trench who keeps memories under pressure until they are strong enough to surface.

attachments.reason: moonwool keeps a memory from unraveling when the pressure changes
